verification: VERDICT PASS. All seven gate criteria satisfied; full reasoning in the notes file.

Depth: 46 internal pages (41 unconditional + 5 owner-gated) under named strategy 'Restaurant Page-Family Matrix v1'; all restaurant families used (menu-category 7, occasion 10, search-intent 10, neighborhood 8, story/info 8, core 3); family counts sum to 46; floor 41 >= 25 with every conditional dropped; inside 25-500.

Evidence grounding: 12 pages spot-checked against sealed Phase 1 keyword/entity findings and Phase 0 facts (catering, palestinian, shawarma, iftar, halal-restaurant, near-airport, marion/fairfax/ely/swisher, best-mediterranean, how-we-cook, halal-heritage, menu categories, vegetarian) — every evidenceBasis traces faithfully; no invented facts; halal/craft/phone/SMS/hours/prices/catering-terms/owner-name/yearEstablished/parking all flagged unverified or owner-gated per the sealed record; 'Estimated' labels carried honestly.

Anti-doorway: 8 neighborhood pages each with distinct competitor-gap basis and fold-if-facts-missing dependency; 7 neighborhood candidates among 13 total folds with credible named reasons (incumbent, contested, factless, unresolved geography); conservative sizing explicitly tied to the local-pack evidence gap; engine neighborhood Zod schema minima (localFacts>=1, proximityTrustLines>=2, townFaqs>=1) verified in restaurant.ts so plan-time and build-time folds agree.
External links: DoorDash/tel/sms/maps/Facebook appear only as CTAs; zero external entries in pageMatrix.

Route mapping: all 7 route kinds verified against real templates in packages/engine/templates (restaurant archetype + shared index.astro) — the 2026-07-05 F12 gap (no restaurant route templates) is fixed; route count = data entries (7 menu + 10 occasions + 18 landings + 8 neighborhoods + 3 fixed = 46); reserved root slugs avoided per RESERVED_ROOT_LANDING_SLUGS; landing kinds and occasion minima match the schema exactly; 5 conditional pages clearly flagged.
requiredCroBlocks and imageSlotPlan (32 slots, representational-only) present and coherent with owner dependencies flagged; Yahya/founder checklist referenced with post-seal gates named.

NON-BLOCKING CAVEAT (W1, from notes): cro-contract.ts registers only 'auto-dealer', so the cro-block-presence gate SKIPS for restaurant builds (and sap-anti-doorway is auto-dealer-only); the artifact's claim that the gate 'fails any page missing a required block' mirrors specialist SKILL.md wording but is not yet true for this archetype. Machine enforcement for restaurant = Zod schema minima + archetype-agnostic C6 content-file rules (>=400 chars, <0.70 near-dup). Downstream phases must treat the CRO block plan as review-enforced until a restaurant CRO contract is registered in the engine.
Integrity: artifact/packet/capsule/Phase-0/Phase-1 hashes all verified (see commandsRun); packet raw-file hash difference explained by the by-design post-hash delegation append.
